name: Spirulina Smoothie
intro: A rehydrating and revitalizing beverage! I recommend swapping all the water out for coconut water if it’s hot outside. Coconut water supplies the body with vital electrolytes that restore salt and mineral levels as you sweat. Spirulina has a cooling effect on the body. It also provides you with vital minerals, chlorophyll, and the fatty acid GLA, which can be helpful with PMS (premenstrual syndrome), skin problems, and eczema.

ingredients.item: freshly squeezed lemon or lime juice
½” (1 cm) piece of fresh ginger

method: Cut the pears and fennel into chunks. Mix them together with the spinach, water, and coconut water. Add the remaining ingredients and blend to a smooth consistency.
